titleStmt.title: SII 9.235: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 235. (A.R. No. 206 of 1913.) ON A STONE SET UP NEAR THE MALLESVARA TEMPLE AT SINDIGERI, BELLARY TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 4th year of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (II), Durmati, Bhādrapada, śu. 6, Ādivāra corresponding to A.D. 1141 August 9, Saturday, not Sunday as stated. The Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāchamallarasa of Baḷḷāre and his subordinate Kēsiyaṇṇa are said to have made a grant of some portion of the toll-revenue for feeding pilgrims in a satra and placed it in charge of Nirvāṇadēva, a Kāḷāmukha teacher.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya(ḥ) gurubhyōnnamaḥ . Āḷaṁbita
jaṭājāḷamudyadindukaḷāṁkuraṁ . carācarasamo(mu)
tpattibījaṁ jayatu dhūrjaṭēḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁ
dracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpri
thvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷaka śrīmacāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu jagadēkamallavari
ṣa 4 neya durmmatisaṁvatsarada bhādrapada suddha caṭṭiyādivāradaṁdu tatpāda
padumōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabuda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ bhōgāvatī
puravarādhīsaṁ yaṇēkanāgakuḷassaṁstutyagōtrapāttraikagātranuṁ visuddhasiṁdakuḷa
kairavavanadivākaranuṁ pracaṇḍamaṇḍaḷikamanōgarvvaparvvatachyēdanavajradaṇḍanuṁ
vidviṣṭavīrārātimaṇḍaḷikasuṇḍāḷapañcānanenuṁ mahēsvarapadapadminīrājahaṁ
sanuṁ kadanatriṇētranuṁ vairikritāntanuṁ śiṁdagōviṁdanuṁ sitagaragaṇḍanuṁ pātāḷa
cakravartti kalikālanandikēsvaranumappa śrīmanumahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ baḷḷāreya rā
camalladēvarasaru tatpādapadmōpajīvi svāmisaṁtōsabīḍina rakṣapāḷakaṁ kēmana
kēsiyaṇanāyaka satrakke biṭṭa dharmma hārikāya tippesuṁka gāṇadali kāśmīrabhū
mi matta Idinisuvaṁ nirvvāṇidēvargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁmāḍi koṭṭa dharmma . I
siṁdageṟeya sthānadalu . kālē kālē yācitē rāmacaṁdra . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harēti vasuṁdhara . Idanāvanārōrvanillendana bāyi kōṣṭi mūḍugu © svasti yamani
yamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhisīlādyānēkaguṇa
saṁpattiyuktaruṁ gurucaraṇasmaraṇapariṇatāṁtaḥkaraṇaru mahēsvarapadapadminī
rājahaṁsaru vyākaraṇatarkkasiddhāntakāvyanāṭakanāṭikāvēdhābhidhānāḷaṁkāraprati
śritipurāṇētihāsa�vomāṁsānītiśāstrādyanēkaśāstrārththapravīṇaru la ta
rakavicētaścamatukṛtikārakapragarbharu pratipakṣatārkkikamanōgarvvaparvatachyē
danavajradaṇḍaruṁ Upanyāsagīrvvāṇataraṁgiṇītaraṁgaruṁ śivadrōhakuḷaviḷayakāḷānaḷaruṁ
kāḷāmukhasamayasamuddharaṇaruṁ paravādimadanamahēśvararumappa muḷugundada śrī
svayaṁbhudēvarācāryyarerkkōṭicakravartti vāmadēvara śiṣyarappa śrīmatṛḷōcanadēva
ra śiṣyarappa kumāradēvara śiṣyaru śrīnirvvāṇidēvaru © gurucaraṇakamaḷabhriṁ
gaṁ sarasakavipravarayācakāmarabhūjaṁ dhareyoḷesadirdda nirvvāṇidēvana caraṇaṁgaḷa neneyalagha
kuḷaṁ nindapudē . pāvanamenisuva nirvvāṇidēvana nenedaṁduyakhiḷaduritasamūhaṁ kēvaḷame koḷugumentene
tilakani tamasamūhamēṁ nindapuvē . garuḍana maṁtrākṣaradiṁduragavisaṁ pōpa teṟada jyōnna
nisida nirvvāṇidēvana caraṇaṁgaḷa neneyalaghakuḷaṁ nindapudē . Antenisi negaṟda muḷuṁguṁdada śrīsvayaṁ
bhudēvarācāryyaru nirvvāṇidēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpradānaṁ māḍi kēmanekēsi yaṇanāyaka koṭṭa dharmma
muḷuṁguṁdaśrīsvayaṁbhudēvarācāryyaru nirvvāṇidēvaru siṁdageṟeya śrīmallikārjjunadēvara
Idu Ekkōṭicakravarttimaṭha Alleṁdana bāya kōṣṭa mūḍugu Avārichatra Īlleṁdana bā
ya kōṣṭi mūḍugu .
Digital edition of SII 9.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
